summary: D-1 DZ Zones Bug Fix & Symbol Switch Scale Bug Fix (Iteration 54) - All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend symbol switch verified working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MES returns nivel_2.dz_d1_vah with zscore and delta_ratio fields
✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MES returns nivel_2.dz_d1_val with zscore and delta_ratio fields
✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MES returns nivel_2.dz_d1_poc with zscore and delta_ratio fields
✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MES nivel_2.transicao_border is one of VAH, VAL, VAH_D1, VAL_D1, MID (currently VAH_D1)
✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MES nivel_2.d1_levels has vah, val, poc fields
✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MNQ also returns dz_d1_vah, dz_d1_val fields in nivel_2
✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MES nivel_2.reason contains 'Borda:' indicating border detection works
✅ POST /api/analyze {symbol:MES, timeframe:1H} returns session_vps with daily_vp and rth_vp
✅ MES price validation: current_price ~6622 is in valid range (5000-8000)
✅ MNQ price validation: current_price ~24350 is in valid range (15000-30000)
✅ All DZ fields (dz_vah, dz_val, dz_vwap, dz_poc, dz_d1_vah, dz_d1_val, dz_d1_poc) have required keys: zscore, delta_ratio, volume_significant, position, signal, net_delta
✅ Frontend: Symbol switch from MNQ to MES clears stale data - chart Y-axis shows 6380-6680 (MES range), not 17000-26000 (MNQ range)
✅ Frontend: MES chart price lines (VAH D-1: 6649.09, POC D-1: 6638.56, VAL D-1: 6629.11) are all in MES range
critical_code_review_comments: Bug 1 Fix (D-1 DZ Zones): Lines 3520-3522 in server.py extract d1_vah_dz, d1_val_dz, d1_poc_dz from dz_n2_levels. Lines 3540-3542 add dz_d1_vah, dz_d1_val, dz_d1_poc to filters with proper dz_metrics.
Bug 1 Fix (TRANSICAO borders): Lines 3637-3640 add VAH_D1 and VAL_D1 borders with their OWN DZ data (d1_vah_dz, d1_val_dz) instead of using session proxy data.
Bug 1 Fix (n2_dz_levels): Lines 4508-4513 add d1_vah, d1_val, d1_poc to n2_dz_levels so Delta Zonal Service computes zones around them.
Bug 2 Fix (Symbol Switch): Lines 348-349 in App.js: setAnalysis(null); setV3Signal(null) clears stale data before fetching new symbol data.
MES is currently in TRANSICAO regime with border VAH_D1 detected. D-1 levels: vah=6649.09, val=6629.11, poc=6638.56

test_credentials.note: Used for API tests and Playwright authentication

seed_data_creation: None - tests use live market data from DataBento
context_for_next_testing_agent: D-1 DZ Zones bug fix verified. Key implementation: (1) Each D-1 border (VAH_D1, VAL_D1, POC_D1) now has its own DZ computation with zscore and delta_ratio fields. (2) In TRANSICAO regime, borders array includes both session (VAH, VAL) and D-1 (VAH_D1, VAL_D1) borders, each using their own DZ data. (3) Frontend clears analysis+v3Signal on symbol switch to prevent stale price lines. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_d1_dz_zones_and_symbol_switch.py with 11 tests.

feature_verification.GET /api/v3/signal/MES nivel_2.dz_d1_vah: Working - returns zscore=0.0, delta_ratio=0.0 (no volume in zone currently)
feature_verification.GET /api/v3/signal/MES nivel_2.transicao: Working - returns 'VAH_D1' (nearest border to current price)
feature_verification.GET /api/v3/signal/MES nivel_2.reason: Working - contains 'Borda: VAH_D1' indicating border detection
feature_verification.POST /api/analyze session_vps: Working - returns daily_vp and rth_vp with poc, vah, val
feature_verification.Frontend symbol switch: Working - MES chart Y-axis shows 6380-6680 range after switching from MNQ

mocked_api_note: SignalStack webhook is MOCKED. All VWAP/VP/DZ data is REAL from DataBento live feed.

bug_1_d1_dz_zones.description: D-1 borders (VAH_D1, VAL_D1, POC_D1) were using session VA proxy data instead of their own zones
bug_1_d1_dz_zones.verification: nivel_2.dz_d1_vah, dz_d1_val, dz_d1_poc now have independent zscore and delta_ratio fields

bug_2_chart_scale.description: MNQ price lines were persisting on MES chart, stretching Y-axis to 26000
bug_2_chart_scale.verification: After switching from MNQ to MES, chart Y-axis shows 6380-6680 (MES range), not 17000-26000 (MNQ range)
